aid_programs.name: President's Award
aid_programs.eligibility: 3.0+ GPA, in-state or out-of-state, automatic consideration
aid_programs.notes: Amount varies by GPA and test scores. Stacks with Pell.

aid_programs.name: Dean's Award
aid_programs.notes: Offered by individual colleges. Check college-specific requirements.

aid_programs.name: Federal Pell Grant
aid_programs.eligibility: FAFSA EFC below threshold, undergrad only
aid_programs.deadline: FAFSA opens Oct 1, priority date Feb 1
aid_programs.notes: Does not need to be repaid. Amount based on EFC, enrollment, and cost of attendance.

aid_programs.name: ASU University Grant
aid_programs.eligibility: Demonstrated need via FAFSA, in-state residents priority
aid_programs.notes: Institutional grant. Does not require repayment.

aid_programs.name: Federal Work-Study
aid_programs.eligibility: FAFSA need-based, must indicate interest on FAFSA
aid_programs.notes: Part-time on-campus employment. 10-15 hrs/week. Many positions in labs, libraries, offices.

aid_programs.name: Federal Direct Loans (Subsidized/Unsubsidized)
aid_programs.eligibility: FAFSA completion, enrolled at least half-time
aid_programs.notes: Subsidized: govt pays interest while in school. Unsubsidized: interest accrues. Must be repaid.
